strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise across 8+ years in full-stack roles, with demonstrated ability to build scalable systems at high volume
Proven full-stack capabilities: React frontend, REST APIs, relational & NoSQL databases, Docker, AWS infrastructure, and DevOps tooling
Strong emphasis on clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship confirmed through multiple senior positions, open-source leadership, and mentoring
concerns: Significantly overqualified—currently Staff Engineer with 14+ years of experience applying for entry-level individual contributor role, creating acute flight-risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; resume mentions generic 'SQL' and MongoDB but not the preferred relational database
Unclear compatibility with 'high on-site presence' requirement given career trajectory as senior/staff engineer—may indicate misalignment in expectations
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds all technical requirements: TypeScript mastery, full-stack capability, REST APIs, database experience, React, and clean-code practices. However, his Staff-level current role and 14+ year career represent a fundamental seniority mismatch with an entry-level position. This overqualification signals high attrition risk—the role likely cannot sustain his technical interests or career trajectory. The hiring organization should clarify whether this candidacy reflects a genuine role misalignment or a deliberate but unusual downshift in seniority.
